fields.label: Client
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 c.sClientName1 FROM tblSiteServices ss LEFT JOIN tblDepartment d ON d.lDepartmentKey = ss.lDepartmentKey LEFT JOIN tblClient c ON c.lClientKey = d.lClientKey ORDER BY ss.lSiteServiceKey DESC

fields.label: Department
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 d.sDepartmentName FROM tblSiteServices ss LEFT JOIN tblDepartment d ON d.lDepartmentKey = ss.lDepartmentKey ORDER BY ss.lSiteServiceKey DESC

fields.label: Tech
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 t.sTechName FROM tblSiteServices ss LEFT JOIN tblTechnicians t ON t.lTechnicianKey = ss.lTechnicianKey ORDER BY ss.lSiteServiceKey DESC

fields.label: Service Date
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 CONVERT(VARCHAR, dtOnsiteDate, 101) AS ServiceDate FROM tblSiteServices ORDER BY lSiteServiceKey DESC

fields.label: Total Billed
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 ISNULL(nInvoiceAmount, 0) AS TotalBilled FROM tblSiteServices ORDER BY lSiteServiceKey DESC

fields.label: Status
fields.sqlQuery: SELECT TOP 5 CASE WHEN dtVoidDate IS NOT NULL THEN 'Voided' WHEN dtInvoiceDate IS NOT NULL THEN 'Invoiced' ELSE 'Draft' END AS Status FROM tblSiteServices ORDER BY lSiteServiceKey DESC
